docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT HALLERMAN, RICHARD

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT HALLERMAN, RICHARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF BY SCOTT RALPH. DEFENDANT RICHARD HALLERMAN WAS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONICALLY. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "REFUSED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY RALPH, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT HALLERMAN, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
